textByHashes.7b42ca07a03bcb143763041a47107aca078ceaa8: Like most people who come to Edgeville, I am here to seek adventure in the Wilderness.
textByHashes.d8deb724cc355bed6e40e8384bc64364391774dc: I found a secret underground river that will take me quite a long way north.
textByHashes.3ef08f43728e5857e0b5857e1138cb0d34d55d79: It comes out in a pond located deep in the Wilderness.
textByHashes.cafe7147b4553a628151f60443f8ea5fd66043a9: I had to find a very special type of canoe to get me up the river though, would you like to know more?
textByHashes.609b3e6c2fc63bf73112e705f29d0feaea49fce6: Well, you don't look like you have the skill to make a canoe.
textByHashes.e9b4e1da7653632b543c5e0539037feea6a9ec08: You need to have at least level 12 woodcutting.
textByHashes.f446cc1d49593fc57624e4f73e640237c5b1b255: Once you are able to make a canoe it makes travel along the river much quicker!
textByHashes.3afaa4f5c8fff0f5ce4bd70f32908a046af36047: It's really quite simple. Just walk down to that tree on the bank and chop it down.
textByHashes.9fa26fa6d6b55d7c1a7fe0f963544101a551898f: When you have done that you can shape the log further with your axe to make a canoe.
textByHashes.df4098189460d2a4715cecd3ac5b59583db6fea7: I can sense you're still a novice woodcutter, you will only be able to make a log canoe at present.
textByHashes.4e00d4f4e2b310c5113279666a9d6fa818036d15: A log will take you one stop along the river. But you won't be able to travel into the Wilderness on it.
textByHashes.c67a89b854193bd50bf520cf1075d72f46360f56: You are an average woodcutter. You should be able to make a Dugout canoe quite easily. It will take you 2 stops along the river.
textByHashes.921dd165eb53e2886ccf5b863290bd8a2f6e86d1: You would never make it there alive.
textByHashes.2815dbe099206e62dccfca3a79ba5410e33127da: You seem to be an accomplished woodcutter. You will easily be able to make a Stable Dugout
textByHashes.037d8700718a7e7f4059b277e644bb2b1d531941: They are reliable enough to get you anywhere on this river, except to the Wilderness of course.
textByHashes.d0ba69b454d16cc0aeec79f827ff50e840100ee3: Only a Waka can take you there.
textByHashes.a83f60c9f9a70f282deb4a6b9d3e432f7a0ac1bc: Come and ask me when you have improved your skills as a woodcutter.
textByHashes.8ea4faa2b3e02187b6e8bd3de3b3065fb387cd36: Your skills rival mine friend. You will certainly be able to build a Waka.
textByHashes.0cb87592087c369d280a3baac372e06b72ad596c: A Waka is an invention of my people, it's an incredible strong and fast canoe and will carry you safely to any destination on the river.
textByHashes.67ddf9376c240ec3408fcb9362fe990105398e7e: Yes, you can take a waka north through the underground portion of this river.
textByHashes.32ae10966195430ab38093f67ac38d16d1b0ece3: It will bring you out at a pond in the heart of the Wilderness. Be careful up there, many have lost more than their lives in that dark and twisted place.
